cards.headline: Overspenders consume 42.2% of employee tokens while producing weak ROI.

problem_details.why_it_matters: This is the clearest finance control opportunity: high consumption with low measured output.

recommended_solution.action: Set spend caps for low-ROI high spenders and require manager review before premium usage is expanded.

cards.headline: AI spend is at 81.7% of budget and next month is forecast at 29114.5.

problem_details.why_it_matters: Spend is still justified, but the run rate is close enough to budget to require controls.

recommended_solution.action: Approve current budget but add monthly alerts by provider, model, team, and user segment.

cards.headline: gpt-4.1 is the highest-cost model in the current mix.

problem_details.why_it_matters: Model routing can reduce cost without cutting AI access if simple tasks move to cheaper models.

recommended_solution.action: Route low-complexity use cases to cheaper models and reserve premium models for high-value features.

cards.headline: 3 feature(s) show high token usage with low estimated business value.

problem_details.why_it_matters: AI spend should be concentrated on revenue growth, cost savings, or critical delivery outcomes.

recommended_solution.action: Require business-value tagging before approving premium model usage on low-priority features.
